parameters.query: =INSERT INTO sync_logs (id, module, status, detail, synced_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'assets', '{{ ($json.status ?? 'success') }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, NOW());

INSERT INTO asset.assets (name, asset_class, sector, base_currency, country, status, figi, isin, identifier, identifier_type) VALUES ('{{ $json.name }}', '{{ $json.asset_class }}', '{{ $json.sector }}', '{{ $json.base_currency }}', '{{ $json.country }}', '{{ $json.status }}', {{ $json.figi ? "'" + $json.figi + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.isin ? "'" + $json.isin + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.identifier }}', '{{ $json.identifier_type }}') ON CONFLICT (identifier) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, asset_class = EXCLUDED.asset_class, sector = EXCLUDED.sector, base_currency = EXCLUDED.base_currency, country = EXCLUDED.country, status = EXCLUDED.status, figi = EXCLUDED.figi, isin = EXCLUDED.isin, identifier_type = EXCLUDED.identifier_type RETURNING asset_id, '{{ $json._listings_json.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS _listings_json

INSERT INTO asset.asset_listings 
  (asset_id, ticker, exchange, currency, is_primary, provider, indices)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.asset_id }}',
  '{{ $json.ticker }}',
  '{{ $json.exchange }}',
  '{{ $json.currency }}',
  {{ $json.is_primary }},
  '{{ $json.provider }}',
  '{{ $json.indices }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (exchange, ticker) 
DO UPDATE SET
  asset_id   = EXCLUDED.asset_id,
  currency   = EXCLUDED.currency,
  is_primary = EXCLUDED.is_primary,
  provider   = EXCLUDED.provider,
  indices    = EXCLUDED.indices;
